Description:
3500X CALL OF DUTY® BLACK OPS 6 EDITION: Mid-Tower PC Case
The CORSAIR 3500X CALL OF DUTY® BLACK OPS 6 EDITION: Mid-Tower Glass PC Case combines builder-friendly features with a stunning wraparound glass aesthetic and the cooling potential you need for an amazing PC.
Wraparound glass view with removable front and side panels
Builder-friendly features for a high-performance custom PC
Side, roof, and PSU fan mounting points for great cooling
Compatible with reverse connector motherboards including ASUS BTF, MSI PROJECT ZERO, and GIGABYTE PROJECT STEALTH
